data.title: AI TRENDS | Quantum Computing Advances: Potential to Enhance AI Data Processing
data.description: Researchers from Caltech, Google Quantum AI, Oratomic, and MIT have introduced a method that could enable quantum computers to handle large AI datasets more efficiently, utilizing less memory. According to NS3.AI, the team suggests that a quantum machine with approximately 300 logical qubits might surpass classical computers in specific tasks. They also estimate that around 60 logical qubits could start demonstrating advantages in certain AI data-processing tasks, although such systems are not currently available.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Whale Alert has reported the minting of 250 million USDC at the USDC Treasury. This development is significant as it reflects ongoing activities within the stablecoin market, which can influence liquidity and trading dynamics. The minting of such a large amount of USDC may impact market sentiment and trading strategies among investors and traders.

data.title: Kevin Warsh Opposes Federal Reserve's Issuance of CBDC
data.description: Kevin Warsh has expressed his view that the Federal Reserve lacks the authority to issue a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC). According to NS3.AI, Warsh, who is a former member of the Federal Reserve Board, stated that even if he were in a position to authorize such a move as chair, he would not support the issuance of a CBDC.

data.title: Kevin Warsh Questions Frequency of Federal Reserve Press Conferences
data.description: Kevin Warsh has raised concerns about the necessity of holding a press conference after each Federal Open Market Committee meeting. According to NS3.AI, Warsh believes that the current level of transparency provided by the Federal Reserve is sufficient.

data.title: U.S. Vice President JD Vance Delays Departure for Iran Talks
data.description: U.S. Vice President JD Vance has postponed his departure for Iran, according to a White House official. The trip, intended for diplomatic discussions, has not yet commenced. According to NS3.AI, the delay comes amid ongoing preparations and considerations for the talks. Further details on the rescheduled departure have not been disclosed.

data.title: White House Confirms U.S. Delegation Members Remain in the Country
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on April 22, the New York Times reported that White House officials confirmed that Witkoff and Kushner have not left the United States. They were supposed to travel to Pakistan as part of the U.S. delegation alongside Vance. However, all three individuals are currently still within the United States.

data.title: US media: Three key US representatives have not yet traveled to Pakistan.
data.description: White House officials stated that Witkov and Kushner also did not leave the United States. They were supposed to travel to Pakistan with Vance as part of the U.S. delegation, but all three remain in the United States. (Jinshi)

data.title: Meta Platforms' Tracking Tools to Monitor Employee Activity
data.description: Meta Platforms has implemented tracking tools that capture mouse movements, keystrokes, and snapshots of content displayed on employees' screens, according to an internal memo. This move is part of the company's efforts to monitor and enhance productivity. According to Jin10, the tools are designed to provide insights into employee engagement and workflow efficiency. The implementation of such monitoring tools has raised concerns about privacy and the extent of surveillance in the workplace. Meta Platforms has stated that the data collected will be used to improve operational efficiency and ensure compliance with company policies. The company emphasizes that the tracking is intended to support employees in optimizing their work processes.

data.title: BlackRock Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Recent Purchase
data.description: Analyst Thomas Fahrer reported that BlackRock has acquired 3,352 Bitcoin, raising its total holdings to 806,000 BTC, valued at approximately $61 billion at current market rates. According to NS3.AI, data from Farside Investors indicated that BlackRock has experienced nine consecutive days of Bitcoin ETF inflows this month. CoinGecko data revealed that Bitcoin's price increased by 1.8% in the last 24 hours.

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair nominee Kevin Warsh was questioned about potential conflicts of interest and independence.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair nominee Kevin Warsh faced questioning at his confirmation hearing before the Senate Banking Committee regarding his disclosures of over $100 million in finances, potential conflicts of interest, and the Fed's independence. Senator Elizabeth Warren questioned whether he might provide special accounts for Trump family crypto companies or bailouts for Wall Street. Warsh stated that his holdings include cryptocurrency and AI companies and pledged to divest these assets before taking office if nominated. Regarding cryptocurrencies, Warsh stated that digital assets are part of the U.S. financial services industry. Furthermore, Warsh denied that Trump had asked him to commit to any specific interest rate decisions. Jerome Powell's term ends on May 15th, and Polymarket users predict a 78% probability of his nomination being approved before June.

data.title: Federal Reserve Nominee Walsh Highlights Policy Differences with Powell
data.description: Federal Reserve nominee Walsh has expressed differences in policy views with Federal Reserve Chairman Powell. According to ChainCatcher, this statement was reported by Jinshi News, highlighting potential divergences in the approach to monetary policy between the two officials.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesperson: No decision yet made on whether to participate in the talks
data.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: No decision has been made yet regarding whether to participate in the talks. (Jinshi)

data.title: KALSHI to launch perpetual futures cryptocurrency trading
data.description: KALSHI will launch perpetual futures cryptocurrency trading.

data.title: Pornhub Transitions from USDT to USDC for Creator Payouts
data.description: Pornhub has announced a shift from using USDT to USDC for payouts to its creators, emphasizing the reliability and security of USDC. According to NS3.AI, this change comes after Pornhub initially adopted USDT in 2020 following PayPal's decision to sever ties with the platform. A screenshot shared by creator Gracie Hartie highlighted Pornhub's description of USDC as fully backed, MiCA-compliant, and regulated.

data.title: Sparklend Sees Surge in Deposits Amid Aave Outflows Following rsETH Incident
data.description: Sparklend has experienced a substantial increase in net deposits, totaling nearly $1.4 billion over the past two days. According to NS3.AI, this surge comes as Aave faces significant outflows following the rsETH incident. Blockworks Research reported that Sparklend also added approximately $350 million in loans during this period. The Spark team announced that it had paused rsETH and other low-usage assets as early as January.

data.title: The Houthi rebels stated they would join the fight if the enemy returned to the battlefield.
data.description: On the 21st local time, the Houthi leader stated, "If the enemy returns to the battlefield, we will join the fight." The Houthi leader said, "Our position is clear and open: we will never remain neutral in the face of the aggression of the United States and Israel against the Islamic Republic of Iran."

data.title: Houthi Leader Vows to Join Battle if Hostilities Resume
data.description: On April 22, local time, Houthi leader declared readiness to engage in combat if adversaries return to the battlefield. According to BlockBeats, the leader emphasized their clear and public stance against aggression by the United States and Israel towards the Islamic Republic of Iran, stating they will not remain neutral.

data.title: White House official: US Vice President Vance has not yet departed for Iran for talks.
data.description: White House official: US Vice President Vance has not yet departed for Iran for talks. (Jinshi)

data.title: Italy's Deficit-to-GDP Ratio Expected to Align with Previous Targets
data.description: Italy is projected to maintain its deficit-to-GDP ratio at approximately 2.8% for this year and 2.6% by 2027, according to sources. This forecast aligns closely with the targets set in September of the previous year. According to Jin10, these figures suggest that Italy is on track to meet its fiscal objectives, reflecting a stable economic outlook.

data.title: U.S. Senator Questions Digital Assets' Role in Financial System
data.description:
U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis raised a question during a hearing on April 22 regarding the inclusion of digital assets in the U.S. financial system. According to BlockBeats, she asked Federal Reserve Chair nominee, Walsh, whether digital assets should be integrated to provide Americans with new investment opportunities and consumer protection.

Walsh responded affirmatively, stating that digital assets are already a part of the structure of the U.S. financial services system.
